name: Christmas Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter or margarine in a large bowl with an electric mixer on medium to high speed for 30 seconds.
2. Add the 1 cup sugar, baking powder, and aniseed. Beat until well combined.
3. Beat in whole eggs and egg yolk.
4. Beat in as much of the flour as you can with the mixer. Stir in the remaining flour, candied fruits, and orange peel with a spoon.
5. Divide dough into two equal parts.
6. Shape each half into an 11x2x1-inch loaf. Place on a lightly greased cookie sheet.
7. Mix together egg white and 1 tsp water. Brush over the dough.
8. Sprinkle with the 1 tbsp sugar.
9. Bake in a 375°F oven for 20 to 25 minutes, or until light brown. Cool on the sheet for 1 hour.
10. Cut each loaf diagonally into 1/2-inch slices. Place slices, cut side up, on an ungreased cookie sheet.
11. Bake in a 325°F oven for 10 minutes. Turn slices over; bake 10 to 13 more minutes, or until crisp. Cool on wire racks. Makes 35. Serve with wine or coffee for dunking.
